questions.question: Name the first and most iconic host of the TV game show Family Feud.
What popular 70's hobby included lingo such as, "breaker, breaker, one-niner," "what's your handle," and "smokey's at your back door"?
The first line of what Dire Straits' song begins with "I want my MTV?"
In 1975, what magnetic tape cassette video format did Sony release?
This TV nerd always was asking the question: "Did I do that?"
